title: Waterdrop Water Filter, Replacement for Sage® Appliances Coffee Machine SES008WHT0NEU1, BES008, Barista SES810/SES875/SES880/SES920/SES980/SES990, TÜV SÜD Certified (3)
features: TÜV SÜD certification: the filter replacement for Sage ClaroSwiss successfully passed the international TÜV SÜD certification.

PREMIUM MATERIALS - Selected activated carbon block and resin can effectively reduce impurities, calcium and magnesium ions and more. The filter replacement for Barista Touch also softens water and enhances flavor for better tasting coffee. In addition, it works effectively to reduce lead, copper and heavy metals in the water. (Tested by a third laboratory)

Filter Change Reminder - To ensure the safety and freshness of drinking water, it is recommended to change the new water filter every 3 months (or 100L), allowing you to monitor the life of the filter in real time.

【Coffee with Good Tasting】The filter replacement for Sage Barista Touch can effectively inhibit scale production, protect the machine, and extend the service life of the machine. At the same time, the filter is made of food-grade material, lead-free and BPA-free, to ensure that you and your family enjoy healthier and more delicious coffee.

PERFECT FIT - Precise design approved, filter replacement for Sage Claro Swiss can fit the original coffee machine without water leakage. More Compatible Models: Oracle Touch (SES990), Barista Pro (SES878), Oracle (SES980), Barista Touch (SES880), Dual Boiler (SES920), Barista Express (SES875), Duo-Temp Pro (SES810), the Bambino Plus (SES500).

Pour some cold water into the water tank until it is full Great Structural Adaptability This Waterdrop coffee filter is in great match with an original coffee maker with no concerns of water leakage. 10s Easy Installation This Waterdrop coffee filter is easy to install and can be replaced within 10s, saving your time and labor. Waterdrop Replacement Filters for Coffee Machines Waterdrop Filters Replacement for Sage SES008WHTONEU Claro Swiss can fit the original coffee maker with no water leak. Other compat-ible models: Compatible with the Oracle Touch (SES990), the Barista Pro (SES878), the Oracle (SES980), the BaristaTouch (SES880), the Dual Boiler (SES920), the Barista Express (SES875), the DuoTemp Pro (SES810), the Bambino Plus (SES500).
